untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 12-month highs/lows (L/M/H positioning) and market regime classification (BULL_MARKET vs BEAR_MARKET) which are not available as ALLOWED INDICATORS or ALLOWED REGIMES. Donchian channels used as proxy for breakout detection, but position relative to 12-month range cannot be determined with available indicators.
translation_notes: Interpreted breakout pattern using Donchian channels (20-period) as a standard breakout detection method. Bull/bear market context and 12-month high/low/middle positioning cannot be translated with available indicators. ADX > 25 used as confirmation of trend strength. Exit set to middle band crossover as reversal signal. Performance statistics from source (4.88% continuation, 3-6 day median holding period) incorporated into hold_days_max and stop_loss parameters.
